questionHtml: Outline what is meant by the edge effect.
markschemeHtml:
a. occurs at the boundary between two ecosystems/habitats 

b. gradient of abiotic conditions at the edge 

c. (as a result) community differs at the edge 

d. community at the edge is more diverse than adjacent communities

meta.title: Outline what is meant by the edge effect.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
